regulations.title: Portuguese Carbon Tax on Industrial Emissions
regulations.summary: Annual declaration in preparation; Fundo Ambiental heat recovery grant application being prepared.

regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: Audit: glass Class A, PET Class B, Tetra Brik Class C — EUR 96-144k EPR surcharge exposure from 2028; carton redesign required.

regulations.title: Portuguese Deposit-Return Scheme
regulations.summary: SIGRE pilot registered 29 January; 10,000 premium glass bottles allocated; pilot launches Q2 2026.

regulations.title: EU Deforestation-free Products Regulation
regulations.summary: Supplier declarations requested from Citrus Brasil and Ingredion Brazil; response expected Q1 2026.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive
regulations.summary: Portuguese preliminary framework extends to seasonal agricultural contracts >90 days; 34 farm contract review initiated.

regulations.title: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
regulations.summary: DMA in progress; BDO Portugal expected to confirm five material topics; FY2025 sustainability statement due June 2026.
